# ErrorRegistry.IsErrorCodeInClass method

Validates that *code* is allowed for the given classification (§22.2, §22.7).

```csharp
public static bool IsErrorCodeInClass(int code, ErrorCodeClass cls)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| code | The numeric error code to test. |
| cls | The classification to test membership against. |

## Return Value

`true` when the code is legal for the classification.
